paragraphs.text: 父亲节快到了，我想给爸爸准备一份特别的礼物。我决定亲手做一张贺卡。
paragraphs.translation: Father's Day is coming, I want to prepare a special gift for Dad. I decided to make a greeting card by hand.

paragraphs.text: 我用彩纸折了一件衬衫，贴在卡片上。然后在卡片里写下：爸爸，您辛苦了，祝您父亲节快乐！
paragraphs.translation: I folded a shirt out of colored paper and pasted it on the card. Then I wrote inside: Dad, thank you for your hard work, Happy Father's Day!

paragraphs.text: 父亲节那天早上，我把卡片送给爸爸。爸爸看了很感动，把我抱起来亲了一口。我爱爸爸！
paragraphs.translation: On Father's Day morning, I gave the card to Dad. Dad was very touched, hugged me and gave me a kiss. I love Dad!
